title: Spanish Chickpea Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and crunchy Spanish-inspired stir-fry made with chickpeas. Serve as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: savory oil
ingredients.notes: such as olive or avocado oil

ingredients.name: stir-fry seasoning
ingredients.notes: such as smoked paprika or cumin

instructions: Heat the savory oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until softened.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Stir in the chickpeas, tomato paste (if using), and stir-fry seasoning.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the chickpeas are coated in the flavorful mixture.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with crunchy bread crumbs (if using).
Optional: top with additional savory oil or a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
